channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Tennis / Padel / Squash venues
channel.description: Latest tennis / padel / squash venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Pickleball Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

item.title: Pattaya Tennis Club
item.description: Central Pattaya outdoor tennis facility with multiple floodlit hard courts, coaching for all levels, equipment rental, drop-in pickup play, and member-led social leagues.

item.title: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
item.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

item.title: Tara Tennis Club
item.description: Newly resurfaced 2022 Pattaya tennis club with 3 hard courts including one covered roof for rain or sun protection. Coaching, hourly hire, social play.

item.title: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy
item.description: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy at Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach side tennis facility (closest to Jomtien) with hard courts, coaching, and social play.

item.title: Siam Bayshore Resort Pattaya Tennis Courts
item.description: Siam Bayshore Resort tennis courts on Walking Street area / South Pattaya Beach Road — 3 outdoor hard courts open to hotel guests and day visitors.

item.title: Euro Badminton
item.description: East Pattaya multi-sport club on Soi Chaiyaphruek 2 with badminton courts, swimming pool, and on-site Thai-food restaurant — popular casual community venue.

item.title: Diamond Badminton
item.description: South Pattaya badminton facility on Pattaya 3rd Road with multiple wood-floor courts available for hourly hire, plus equipment rental and casual play nights.

item.title: Pattaya Tennis & Badminton Inter Club
item.description: Multiple courts: pickleball, badminton, tennis, table tennis. Multi-racquet facility.

item.title: Play Padel Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's first dedicated padel club at Kasetsin Soi 3, Pratumnak — also Thailand's first indoor padel courts with bookable hourly play, equipment rental, and clinics for all levels.

item.title: Pattaya Padel Club (Mabprachan Lake)
item.description: Lakeside padel courts on Mabprachan Reservoir. Pattaya second padel facility alongside Play Padel.
